testsuite.name: projects.AmazonEndtoEnd1.Testcase10_AddingRemovingQuanities

testcase.name: cartItems
testcase.system-out: Item quanity is increased Item quanity is Decreased Items moved to checkout

testsuite.system-out: Amazon launched in browser Amazon logged in successfully Guest user successfully added items to cart and navigated till checkout page Products sorted by Bestsellers Products sorted by Review Item quanity is increased Item quanity is Decreased Items moved to checkout
